description: The AxisPanner component is used to move an object along a single axis linearly. This component can affect position and scale.

fields.TimeBase: Reference to the timebase or "clock" that the component will use for moving an object. Possible components that can be used as an input include AuthorityTimeBase.
fields.Speed: The speed at which the object will move.
fields.Range: How far the object will move.
fields.Offset: Where the object starts its move.
fields.Axis: The direction that the object will move in.
fields.ReferenceScale: Sets the maximum scale that the object will become at the halfway point. Starting at 0 the object will grow to this size and then back to 0.
fields.FullScaleRangeRatio: Changes the duration that the object scale will remain at the ReferenceScale size.
fields._position: Reference to the position that is being driven. By default, set the to object that this component is first attached to.
fields._scale: Reference to the scale that is being driven. By default, set to null.
